attributes.title: About DMARC failure reports (RUF)
attributes.visState:
{"title":"About DMARC failure reports (RUF)","type":"markdown","aggs":[],"params":{"fontSize":12,"openLinksInNewTab":false,"markdown":"## About DMARC failure reports (RUF)

DMARC failure reports (RUF) contain an email sample that filed  DMARC. These can be very useful for DMARC troubleshooting and phishing investigations. However, **most email providers** do not send failure reports, or may only supply the message headers for privacy reasons.

If you want to ensure that email samples are not saved here, **do not** set a `ruf ` address in your domain's DMARC record.


"}}
